methodsAttempted.query: "研判人工智能技术在科研活动应用中可能存在的失信行为" "郑州大学"
methodsAttempted.notes: Open web search located an official Zhengzhou University PDF rule text and an official academic committee report containing the same AI-related academic-ethics duty language.

Plain HTTP fetches succeeded for the main Zhengzhou University AI literacy standards announcement and the AI development-plan solicitation page. The main-domain robots.txt path returned the university 404 page rather than disallow rules.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery did not verify a central binding university-wide ChatGPT or generative-AI use policy. The strongest official evidence found is a Zhengzhou University announcement of undergraduate and teacher AI literacy standards and an official academic-ethics committee rule PDF that includes AI-related research misconduct risk review. Claims are limited to those source texts.

artifacts.claimText: Zhengzhou University announced undergraduate and teacher artificial-intelligence literacy standards that frame student competencies and teacher development around AI awareness, application, teaching design, evaluation, ethics, safety, and responsibility.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI literacy standards announced for undergraduate students and teachers

citation.citationTitle: 郑州大学发布师生人工智能素养标准
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Zhengzhou University said implementation of the AI literacy standards would include an AI general compulsory course, AI plus major course clusters, a university-level AI experiment platform, AI cultural activities, innovation competitions, and incentive links to teaching evaluation and professional-title review.

citation.citationTitle: 郑州大学发布师生人工智能素养标准

artifacts.claimText: Zhengzhou University's academic ethics committee rules include studying and judging possible dishonest conduct arising from the application of artificial-intelligence technology in research activities among the committee's duties.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI use in research misconduct risk is within academic ethics committee duties

artifacts.sourceTitle: 郑州大学发布师生人工智能素养标准
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 本科生标准围绕“意识与认知、知识与技能、应用与创新、伦理与安全”四大维度，设立四级认证体系；教师标准聚焦“意识与认知、教学设计与实施、评估与优化、伦理与责任”四大模块，建立三级发展体系。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The undergraduate standard covers awareness/cognition, knowledge/skills, application/innovation, and ethics/safety; the teacher standard covers awareness/cognition, teaching design/implementation, evaluation/optimization, and ethics/responsibility.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Paragraph beginning 王海杰在致辞中指出
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 郑州大学发布师生人工智能素养标准
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 为保障标准落地，学校将构建课程教学、学习资源、实践平台、校园文化、激励保障“五位一体”支撑体系，包括开设人工智能通识必修课、建设“AI+专业”课程群、开放校级AI实验平台、举办AI文化节与创新大赛、建立与教学评价及职称评审适度挂钩的激励机制等。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For implementation, the university says it will build a five-part support system including a required AI general course, AI plus major course clusters, a university AI experiment platform, AI cultural activities and competitions, and incentive mechanisms.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Paragraph beginning 王海杰在致辞中指出

artifacts.title: Zhengzhou University AI Policy Staged Crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl found official Zhengzhou University evidence for AI literacy standards for undergraduates and teachers, implementation supports for AI learning and teaching, and an academic-ethics committee duty to assess dishonest conduct risks from AI use in research. It did not verify a central binding ChatGPT or generative-AI use policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are limited to the official sources fetched in this staged run and should not be read as a comprehensive university-wide AI policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
